artPrompt: A red-faced human zealot bellows skyward atop an overturned crate, veins straining, a blank placard clutched overhead, his single furious conviction lit by cold gold halo glow as the looming clock tower and a blood-dark apocalyptic sky tower behind him. Ash drifts through the candlelit revival crowd at his feet. Dynamic low film-still angle of swelling rage, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Single-Issue Zealot
text:
Single-Issue Zealot gets +1/+1 for each doom counter on the Doomsday Clock divided by three, rounded down. The worse it gets, the louder he gets.
Menace
flavorText: He has exactly one talking point. He will deliver it at your wedding.
